_meta.description: Machine-readable map of SHARD's backend modules. Used by SelfModel and future capability-driven refactoring to reason about system structure.
_meta.schema: module_id -> { responsibility, layer, depends_on, reads, writes, capability_tags, notes }

study_agent.responsibility: Autonomous learning pipeline — aggregates web sources, synthesizes knowledge, validates via sandbox, certifies topics
study_agent.notes: Core learning loop. previous_score param injects near-miss context into LLM prompts (Fix B SSJ5).

night_runner.responsibility: Orchestrator for autonomous night study sessions — topic selection, cycle management, SSJ hooks
night_runner.notes: Topic quarantine (_is_quarantined) blocks topics with 3+ hard fails. Fix A validates SSJ3 improvement topics.

server.responsibility: FastAPI + Socket.IO HTTP server — exposes all REST endpoints and real-time events to the React frontend

shard.responsibility: Gemini Live voice session — mic/speaker I/O, auto-reconnect with exponential backoff
shard.notes: SSJ4 Phase 1: outer retry loop, backoff 1->2->4->8->max 30s, _stop_requested flag.

capability_graph.responsibility: Persistent registry of SHARD's certified skills and their relationships
capability_graph.notes: Async-safe with asyncio.Lock. get_certified_skills(), get_all_skills(), certify().

strategy_memory.responsibility: Semantic memory for study strategies — stores and retrieves strategies by topic similarity
strategy_memory.notes: Async-safe with asyncio.Lock. Uses ChromaDB vector store.

meta_learning.responsibility: Tracks which study strategies work best per topic category and suggests the optimal strategy for new topics
meta_learning.notes: SSJ4 Phase 2. suggest_best_strategy(topic) injected into phase_synthesize and phase_materialize.

memory.responsibility: Short-term and long-term episodic memory for SHARD's conversations and inner thoughts
memory.notes: Uses ChromaDB. Currently stores conversations — NOT linked to experiment_history (gap: no unified episodic layer).

llm_router.responsibility: Routes LLM calls across providers (Claude, Groq, Ollama) with circuit breaker and exponential backoff
llm_router.notes: SSJ3: 3 states CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN, backoff 1->2->4s+jitter, timeout per-provider.

sandbox_runner.responsibility: Executes LLM-generated Python code in isolation and returns stdout/stderr/exit code
sandbox_runner.notes: DockerSandboxRunner class. Extracted from study_agent in SSJ3 refactor.

browser_scraper.responsibility: Web scraping for study source aggregation — Playwright/httpx, returns raw text per URL
browser_scraper.notes: StudyBrowserScraper class. Extracted from study_agent in SSJ3 refactor.

research_agenda.responsibility: Selects the next study topic based on capability gaps and learning map
research_agenda.notes: DEFAULT_LEARNING_MAP defines the canonical skill curriculum.

experiment_inventor.responsibility: Generates novel study topics by combining existing capabilities combinatorially
experiment_inventor.notes: Used by night_runner for capability-recombination topic source.

experiment_replay.responsibility: Retrieves past failed experiments for Phoenix Protocol retry selection
experiment_replay.notes: Phoenix Protocol picks candidates with score 6.0-7.4 for smart retry.

self_analyzer.responsibility: Analyzes experiment history and capability graph to generate ImprovementTickets (SSJ3)
self_analyzer.notes: 4 ticket types: retry_chronic_failure (P1), certify_near_miss (P1), retry_grown (P2), fill_capability_gap (P2).

improvement_engine.responsibility: Consumes ImprovementTickets from SelfAnalyzer and persists them as prioritized study queue
improvement_engine.notes: NightRunner drains this queue at Priority -1 (before normal topic selection).

proactive_refactor.responsibility: Analyzes core backend files and proposes code patches for human approval (SSJ4 Phase 3)
proactive_refactor.notes: Round-robin on 10 core files. Each old string validated to exist exactly once. .bak backup before apply. FUTURE: replace round-robin with capability-driven targeting.

error_watchdog.responsibility: Scans NightRunner logs for Python exceptions and triggers SWEAgent to patch the affected file
error_watchdog.notes: SSJ2. Reactive (exception-driven) vs ProactiveRefactor which is proactive.

swe_agent.responsibility: Software engineering agent — reads error context, generates and applies code patches, commits via git
swe_agent.notes: Called by ErrorWatchdog on exception detection. Also used by ProactiveRefactor flow.

consciousness.responsibility: Generates SHARD's spontaneous thoughts and inner monologue for topic inspiration
consciousness.notes: Used as one of 3 topic sources in night_runner._select_topic().

session_orchestrator.responsibility: Manages the Gemini Live WebSocket session — audio I/O loop, transcription callbacks, vision frames
session_orchestrator.notes: Parses model_turn.parts directly. Charon voice 24kHz. Vision at 2fps 1280x720 JPEG.

shard_semaphore.responsibility: Mutual exclusion between voice session and NightRunner — prevents concurrent Gemini API usage
shard_semaphore.notes: Architectural bottleneck: SHARD cannot learn while speaking. Known limitation.

db_manager.responsibility: Singleton ChromaDB client factory — one PersistentClient per path, thread-safe, eliminates SQLite lock contention
db_manager.notes: SSJ3 fix for Windows SQLite lock contention. All ChromaDB modules go through this.

goal_engine.responsibility: Manages SHARD's active goals and selects study topics aligned with current objectives
goal_engine.notes: Wired into night_runner topic selection and server goal endpoints.

self_model.responsibility: SHARD's self-awareness model — summarizes capabilities, computes live performance metrics, assesses capability gaps
self_model.notes: Metrics: get_certification_rate() 20.5%, get_avg_repair_loops() 3.87. get_prediction_accuracy() removed (mathematically invalid).

graph_rag.responsibility: Causal knowledge graph over SQLite — extracts and queries causal relations between concepts
graph_rag.notes: Write: extract_and_store_relations() during SYNTHESIZE. Read: query_causal_context() injected into swarm Architect, benchmark_loop correction, and SYNTHESIZE prompts.

study_personas.responsibility: Dynamic persona selector for study sessions — picks THEORETICAL/HACKER/VISUAL based on topic category and meta-learning stats
study_personas.notes: select_persona(topic) returns PersonaSpec with system_prompt, style, focus. Wired into night_runner topic selection.

concurrency_simulator.responsibility: Pre-benchmark stress test — probes source code for race conditions, deadlocks, and atomicity bugs before pytest runs
concurrency_simulator.notes: probe_concurrency(source, tests) returns ConcurrencyReport. Wired into benchmark_loop as pre-check before first attempt.

report_agent.responsibility: Intelligent night recap generator — queries chronic failures, near-misses, trending categories, generates actionable insights
report_agent.notes: generate_insights() called by night_runner._generate_markdown_recap() to add INSIGHTS section.

llm_cache.responsibility: LLM response cache — in-memory LRU with SQLite persistence, avoids duplicate LLM calls
llm_cache.notes: cached_llm_complete() drop-in for llm_complete(). TTL 2h, max 500 entries, bypasses if temperature > 0.3. Used by swarm reviewers.

patch_simulator.responsibility: What-if simulator for code patches — static diff analysis + LLM risk assessment per dependent module
patch_simulator.notes: simulate_patch() async (static + LLM). simulate_patch_sync() instant (static only). Wired into server.py _emit_patch_approval() and /api/patch/simulate.
